prompt: A small bakery starts Monday morning with an inventory of 250 muffins. Each day, they bake 150 new muffins and add them to the inventory at the start of the day. Muffins are sold daily. From Monday to Friday, they have orders for 180 muffins each day. On Saturday, they have orders for 220 muffins, and on Sunday, orders for 50 muffins. The bakery always fulfills as many orders as possible, selling up to the current available inventory. However, due to a power outage on Wednesday, only 75 muffins were baked that day instead of the usual 150. How many muffins are left in the inventory at the end of Sunday?
